name: KFC Almost Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a paste out of the marinade ingredients. Coat chicken evenly. Stack chicken pieces in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate overnight or at least for several hours.
2. Mix pancake mix with other seasonings. Dip pieces of chicken in milk, then in pancake coating. Dust off excess.
3. In a skillet with 1/2 inch vegetable oil, brown the chicken on each side for 4 minutes.
4. Remove and place the chicken in a single layer on a shallow baking pan. Seal with flour.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Uncover and baste again with milk.
6. Return, uncovered, to the oven heated to 400°F, to crisp for 10 minutes.
